  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30834008</id>
    <published>2026-07-08T19:41:28Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-08T19:41:28Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/rvb96c56gn6k"/>
    <title>Degraded performance for Claude Code on the web, Cowork Remote, Claude Tag, and Claude Code Review sessions</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:41</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:07</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating a performance issue affecting features such as Claude Code on the Web (claude.ai/code), Claude Code Review, Cowork Remote, Claude Tag, and document creation in claude.ai. Our team is working on mitigating this issue. </p></content>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30834089</id>
    <published>2026-07-08T19:00:00Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-08T19:20:41Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/4y9nybhbljfc"/>
    <title>Issues authorizing to MCP Servers</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:00</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - Users are unable to send authorized requests to MCP servers. </p></content>
  </entry>
  <entry>
    <id>tag:status.claude.com,2005:Incident/30833387</id>
    <published>2026-07-08T19:29:46Z</published>
    <updated>2026-07-08T19:29:46Z</updated>
    <link rel="alternate" type="text/html" href="https://status.claude.com/incidents/dcxc66flmxbd"/>
    <title>Elevated errors on multiple models</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:29</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - We are continuing to work to fully resolve errors impacting some requests, and will provide an additional update as soon as possible. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>19:05</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - At this time, success rates have recovered across impacted models and we are monitoring closely to ensure no further issues occur. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>18:28</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - We have identified an issue causing elevated errors on requests to some models, and our team is working to resolve this issue as quickly as possible. We will provide an additional update shortly. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 8</var>, <var data-var='time'>18:00</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>
  </entry>
